steps.title: Find the logical relation
steps.content: Mason opposed ratification of the Constitution, and the essays he published attacked federalist arguments supporting ratification. The second action naturally fits the first; it is not a contrast, comparison, or restatement.

steps.title: Select the fitting transition
steps.content: Choice A signals comparison, choice C signals contrast, and choice D signals restatement. The sentence needs a transition showing that the later action is appropriate given Mason's anti-federalist position. "Fittingly" expresses that relationship. The answer is B.
